alerts.headline: Lake Wind Advisory issued May 15 at 10:12AM PDT until May 17 at 11:00PM PDT by NWS Reno NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Northeast winds 15 to 25 mph with gusts up to 40 mph for
Washoe Lake.

* WHERE...Greater Reno-Carson City-Minden Area.

* WHEN...From 11 AM to 11 PM PDT Sunday.

* IMPACTS...Small boats, kayaks and paddle boards will be prone to
capsizing and should remain off lake waters until conditions
improve.
alerts.instruction:
Check lake conditions before heading out and be prepared for a
sudden increase in winds and wave heights. Consider postponing
boating activities on the lake until a day with less wind.

alerts.headline: High Wind Watch issued May 15 at 2:08PM PDT until May 18 at 5:00AM PDT by NWS Las Vegas NV
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Northwest winds 25 to 35 mph with gusts between 50 and 60
mph possible.

* WHERE...Portions of northwest Arizona, southeast California, and
south central and southern Nevada.

* WHEN...From Sunday morning through late Sunday night.

* IMPACTS...Damaging winds could blow down trees and power lines.
Widespread power outages are possible. Travel could be difficult,
especially for high-profile vehicles. Blowing dust and reduced
visibility is possible.
alerts.instruction:
Monitor the latest forecasts and warnings for updates.

Fasten loose objects or shelter objects in a safe location prior to
the onset of winds.

Strong winds and rough waves on area lakes will create hazardous
conditions for small craft.
